items.title: Adverts for DNA self-swab kits banned as misleading
items.summary: The Advertising Standards Authority has ruled Enough's online posts contained unproven claims.

items.title: Early War Goal Was to Install Hard Line Former President as Iran’s Leader
items.summary: An Israeli strike designed to free Mahmoud Ahmadinejad from house arrest in Tehran, U.S. officials said, was part of an effort to bring about regime change and put him in power.
